zh.Braces Mar, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Finley於1248年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親Fearchar MacFinlay38歲，母親Mora MacDonachadh30歲。他於1290年與Margaret Robertson在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1263年登記服兵役。他去世於1348年11月12日在他的家鄉享年100歲。

zh-hans.Braces Mar, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Finley于1248年出生在苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲Fearchar MacFinlay38岁，母亲Mora MacDonachadh30岁。他于1290年与Margaret Robertson在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1263年登记服兵役。他去世于1348年11月12日在他的家乡享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: Finley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (Old Irish Findlaech), from fionn ‘white, fair’ (see Finn ) + laoch ‘hero’, reinforced by an Old Norse name based on finn ‘Finn’ + leikr ‘fight’ or ‘hero’. The name is common in Ireland as well as Scotland.

English: habitational name from one or more lost, unidentified or altered placenames so named, such as Philleyholme, Dorset (recorded as Finelegh in 1280) derived from Old English fīna ‘wood-pecker’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Also a variant of Findlow, from Finlow Hill in Over Alderley, Cheshire (from Old English fīn ‘heap’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’ meaning ‘heaped mound’).

variants.name: Finn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Aidan, Bridie, Brigid, Declan, Dierdra, Eoin, Keelin, Maeve, Niall, Seamus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Finn ‘descendant of Fionn’, a byname meaning ‘white’ or ‘fair-haired’; it is often found Anglicized as White . This name is borne by several families in the west of Ireland.

English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Fin(n) (Old Norse Finnr, Fin, originally ‘Finn’), used both as a byname and as a short form of various compound names with this first element.

variants.name: Finlayson
meanings: Scottish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (see Finley 1 and Finlay ) + -son. This is the Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic MacFhionnlaigh.

variants.name: Finlay
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Finley   1.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Finley was born in 1248, in Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Fearchar MacFinlay, was 38 and his mother, Mora MacDonachadh, was 30. He married Margaret Robertson in 1290, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1263. He died on 12 November 1348, in his hometown, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Finley est né en 1248, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Fearchar MacFinlay, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mora MacDonachadh, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Robertson en 1290, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1263. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1348, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Finley 1248 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fearchar MacFinlay 38 und seine Mutter Mora MacDonachadh 30. Er hat 1290 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Robertson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1263 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 12. November 1348 im Alter von 100 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Finley è nato il nel 1248 nel Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Fearchar MacFinlay, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mora MacDonachadh, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Robertson nel 1290, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1263. Morì il 12 novembre 1348, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Finleyが1248年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Fearchar MacFinlayは38歳，母Mora MacDonachadhは30歳であった。1290年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでMargaret Robertsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1263年に兵役登録をした。彼は1348年11月12日に故郷で100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Finley(이)가 1248년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fearchar MacFinlay(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mora MacDonachadh(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1290년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Margaret Robertson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1263년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1348년 11월 12일 그의 고향에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Finley nasceu em 1248, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Fearchar MacFinlay, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mora MacDonachadh, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Robertson em 1290, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1263. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1348, em sua cidade natal, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Finley родился в 1248 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Fearchar MacFinlay было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mora MacDonachadh, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Robertson в 1290 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1263 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 12 ноября 1348 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archibald Finley nació en 1248, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Fearchar MacFinlay, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mora MacDonachadh, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Robertson en 1290, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1263. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1348, en su pueblo, a la edad de 100 años.
